specs.title: SETTINGS-01 wave A — access.voterApp
SETTINGS-01 wave A — header.showFeedback

annotations.description: PRODUCT-GAP — (voters)/+layout.svelte topBarSettings.push captures $appSettings.header.showFeedback once at mount (not reactive); appSettingsValue is initialized to dynamicSettings defaults and only updated via $effect AFTER mount. Verified via trace: DB has showFeedback:false but Banner renders feedback button. Cell asserter-able only after a topBarSettings reactivity fix or Banner direct-gate refactor (Phase 78 candidate).

PRODUCT-GAP — (voters)/+layout.svelte topBarSettings.push captures $appSettings.header.showFeedback once at mount (not reactive); appSettingsValue is initialized to dynamicSettings defaults and only updated via $effect AFTER mount. Verified via trace: DB has showFeedback:false but Banner renders feedback button. Cell asserter-able only after a topBarSettings reactivity fix or Banner direct-gate refactor (Phase 78 candidate).

specs.title: SETTINGS-01 wave A — header.showHelp

annotations.description: PRODUCT-GAP — same root cause as header.showFeedback (topBarSettings.push is not reactive on $appSettings, and appSettingsValue starts at static dynamicSettings defaults before $effect merges page.data). Captured as a Phase 78 follow-up.

PRODUCT-GAP — same root cause as header.showFeedback (topBarSettings.push is not reactive on $appSettings, and appSettingsValue starts at static dynamicSettings defaults before $effect merges page.data). Captured as a Phase 78 follow-up.

specs.title: SETTINGS-01 wave A — notifications.voterApp

annotations.description: PRODUCT-GAP — (voters)/+layout.svelte:43-50 onMount() reads $appSettings.notifications.voterApp once at mount; appSettingsValue is still at dynamicSettings defaults (notifications.voterApp:null) until app context $effect merges page.data. The Notification popup is never queued for the post-overlay runtime value. Captured as a Phase 78 follow-up.

PRODUCT-GAP — (voters)/+layout.svelte:43-50 onMount() reads $appSettings.notifications.voterApp once at mount; appSettingsValue is still at dynamicSettings defaults (notifications.voterApp:null) until app context $effect merges page.data. The Notification popup is never queued for the post-overlay runtime value. Captured as a Phase 78 follow-up.
